allow: Bash(PGPASSWORD=coching2024 psql -h 127.0.0.1 -U coching -d erns_es_dev -c "SELECT count\(*\) as table_count FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema NOT IN \(''information_schema'', ''pg_catalog''\);")
